study_group_representative.quote: We interviewed 1008 participants on Jan 20–23 (22% response rate), 1000 participants on Feb 11–14 (23% response rate), and 1005 participants on March 10–13 (response rate 15%; appendix p 3).

intervention_and_participants_defined.quote: We analysed data on laboratory-confirmed COVID-19 cases, influenza surveillance data in outpatients of all ages, and influenza hospitalisations in children... Attitudes towards COVID-19 and changes in population behaviours were reviewed through three telephone surveys done on Jan 20–23, Feb 11–14, and March 10–13, 2020.

outcome_assessed_for_60pct.quote: We interviewed 1008 participants... 1000 participants... and 1005 participants... Respondents included a broad cross-section of the adult population of Hong Kong.

follow_up_length_reported.quote: We examined the effect of these interventions and behavioural changes of the public on the incidence of COVID-19, as well as on influenza virus infections... through three telephone surveys done on Jan 20–23, Feb 11–14, and March 10–13, 2020.

outcome_assessors_blinded.quote: Calls were made during both working and non-working hours by trained interviewers to avoid over-representation of non-working groups.

outcome_definition_objective_precise.quote: Data on laboratory-confirmed COVID-19 cases were obtained from the Hong Kong Centre for Health Protection... influenza-like illness, defined as fever plus cough or sore throat.

important_prognostic_factors_accounted_f.quote: Means and proportions of survey responses were directly weighted by sex and age to the general population.

analysis_described_and_effect_quantified.quote: We estimated the daily effective reproduction number (Rt) for COVID-19 and influenza A H1N1 to estimate changes in transmissibility over time... with a 44% (95% CI 34–53%) reduction in transmissibility in the community.
